title: Rear Right Door Lock Actuator LR013890 LR091345 LR013892 C2D5641 for Land Rover Range Rover Sport L320 L494 Discovery IV L319 Evoque L538, Jaguar Rear Door Lock Mechanism Replacement
features: 1.Fits rear-right door lock actuator applications for Land Rover / Range Rover: Range Rover Sport (L320) 2005–2013, Range Rover Sport (L494) 2013–2022, Discovery IV (L319) 2009–2018, Range Rover Evoque (L538) 2011–2019 (incl. Evoque Cabrio). Direct replacement for rear right locking motor/door lock assembly.

2.Key OEM numbers (selected): LR013890, LR091345, LR077828 and 8X2A26412AC/AD/AE. Also cross‑references LR013892 / C2D5641 in some applications. Matches Land Rover factory part refs for rear right door lock actuator — OE‑style replacement.
3. Attention during verification: Ensure that you check the model, year of manufacture, and OEM number of your vehicle to guarantee a perfect fit and optimal function.
4. 3 months warranty: Buy with confidence! We offer a 3-month warranty for this lock actuator, and if any defects occur, it can be repaired or replaced.

5. Fast customer support: Do you have questions? Contact us within 12 hours and we will respond to your email! Technical support is available for all clarifications regarding installation and compatibility.
description: Product Description Product information: Condition: Brand new Color: Black Voltage: 12V Drive type: Electric Housing material: ABS (Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene) Installation position:Right rear OEM Nummer: LAND ROVER — 8X2A26412AC LAND ROVER — 8X2A26412AD LAND ROVER — 8X2A26412AE LAND ROVER — LR013890 LAND ROVER — LR077828 LAND ROVER — LR091345 Passende Fahrzeuge LAND ROVER LAND ROVER Range Rover Sport (L320) (Baujahr 02.2005 - 03.2013) LAND ROVER Discovery IV (L319) (Baujahr 09.2009 - 12.2018) LAND ROVER Range Rover Evoque (L538) (Baujahr 06.2011 - 12.2019) LAND ROVER Range Rover Sport (L494) (Baujahr 04.2013 - 03.2022) LAND ROVER Range Rover Evoque Cabrio (L538) (Baujahr 02.2016 - 12.2019) 14 Pins Identical to your previous product – you can use it effortlessly without any additional learning effort. Compatible with Land Rover Range Rover Sport (L320, L494), Discovery IV (L319), Range Rover Evoque (L538, including Cabrio), and select Jaguar models. Please check your vehicle model and year for precise fitment. Replaces OEM numbers: LR013890, LR091345, LR013892, C2D5641, LR077828, 8X2A26412AC, 8X2A26412AD, 8X2A26412AE. Manufactured to meet or exceed factory standards for reliable operation. Designed for the rear right (driver’s side) door. Effectively restores proper door locking and unlocking functions for enhanced vehicle security and convenience. Made from premium materials for long-lasting durability and dependable performance, even under frequent use and harsh conditions.
